design_philosophy.strategy: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid for maximum data density, correlation, and scanability. Focus on functional monochrome with signal colors (Red/Green) indicating actionable trade statuses. Typography heavily relies on variable weights and mono-spaced digits for precision.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look) using flat surfaces, 1px sharp borders, and zero shadows for default states.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50

button.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold text-sm transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium text-sm transition-colors
button.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold text-sm transition-colors

badge.accepted: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm font-bold
badge.rejected: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm font-bold
badge.analyzing: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-200 uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm font-bold
badge.neutral: bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border border-gray-200 uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm font-bold

components.input: border-gray-300 rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900/20 focus:border-slate-900 text-sm font-mono
components.label: text-xs tracking-widest uppercase text-gray-500 font-bold mb-1.5 block
components.chart: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts with flat tooltips, monochrome grid lines, and status colors for data points.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background or border color on hover. Text colors must remain high-contrast.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use an ASCII-style loader or sharp linear progress bars instead of generic spinning circles.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use Phosphor Icons with 'regular' or 'bold' weights for dashboard density.

urls.description: Abstract black and white geometric pattern for login or settings sidebar background
Abstract vertical bars representing market data for empty states or generic banners

pages_and_structure.name: Dashboard / Overview
sections: Top Nav: Bot Status (Online/Offline Toggle), Connected API indicator.
KPI Row (col-span-1 each): Total Signals, Accepted (Green), Rejected (Red), Win Rate / Accuracy.
Main Chart (col-span-3): Signal volume and acceptance rate over time.
Live Feed (col-span-1 row-span-2): Vertically scrolling list of latest incoming signals with AI reasoning snippet.
Recent Trades Table (col-span-3): Detailed view of recent analyzed signals with Risk/Reward, Trend, and Action.

pages_and_structure.name: Settings / Configuration
pages_and_structure.layout: Split layout (2 columns on large screens)
sections: AI Filter Rules: Form inputs for Min R/R Ratio, Volume Thresholds, Trend Alignment.
Telegram Connection: Form inputs for API ID, Hash, and Bot Token. Use password type for secrets.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.html.
Use Phosphor icons for all iconography. Use Phosphor Icons with 'regular' weight.
Use standard Tailwind classes. For custom spacing use p-6 or p-8 inside cards.
Use Recharts for the main dashboard chart with the provided chart_palette.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Chivo font-bold or font-black.
Implement the 'Control Room' dense bento grid. Make sure grid heights stretch consistently using h-full.
Apply 'data-testid' to every button, input, and interactive badge.
Never use rounded-lg or fully rounded buttons. Adhere to rounded-sm for the rigid, technical aesthetic.
When displaying crypto/fiat numbers, always wrap them in an element using the mono font (JetBrains Mono).
